# Matthew Scott - Web Developer & AI Consultant
https://projectlavos.com

## About
Matthew Scott is a full-stack web developer and AI consultant based in Louisville, Kentucky, and the founder of Project Lavos LLC. He builds production-grade websites and applications for small and medium-sized businesses. His portfolio includes 69 deployed demo websites for real businesses, 4 practical web applications, and 10 conceptual explorations featuring scroll-driven 3D experiences. All sites are live, working, and built by one person with AI collaboration.

## Contact
- Email: matthewdscott7@gmail.com
- Phone: 502-345-0525
- GitHub: https://github.com/guitargnarr
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/mscott77
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/guitargnar
- Location: Louisville, KY

## Development Philosophy
Four principles guide the work:
1. Substance first - Working software over impressive pitches
2. Built to last - Good systems outlast good intentions
3. Measure twice - Test the work, then ship it
4. People over tech - Technology works for humans, not the reverse

Additional values: show don't tell, simple scales, test the seams, tools serve people.

## Louisville Business Portfolio (69 Deployed Demo Sites)

Demonstration websites built from publicly available business information as proof of capability. Each site is fully functional, deployed on Vercel, and showcases modern web development. Covers Louisville neighborhoods including St. Matthews, Germantown, Middletown, Jeffersontown, the Highlands, Dutchmans Lane, Downtown, Crestwood, and Westport Road.

### Healthcare & Medical (16 sites)
- **Primary Express Care** (https://primary-express-care.vercel.app) - Multi-location urgent care
- **Kentuckiana Gastroenterology** (https://kentuckiana-gastro.vercel.app) - Gastroenterology specialists since 1984
- **Rejuvenation Med Spa** (https://rejuvenation-med-spa.vercel.app) - Pain management and medical aesthetics
- **Louisville Aesthetics** (https://louisville-aesthetics.vercel.app) - Modern medical aesthetics clinic
- **Scout Aesthetics** (https://scout-aesthetics.vercel.app) - Premier med spa and aesthetic wellness center
- **XO Aesthetic Refinery** (https://xo-aesthetic-refinery.vercel.app) - Boutique med spa
- **Springhurst Endodontics** (https://springhurst-endo.vercel.app) - Root canal specialists
- **dGv Services** (https://dgv-services.vercel.app) - Medical billing and revenue management
- **Vance & Stovall Optometry** (https://vance-stovall-optometry.vercel.app) - Independent optometry, 40+ years
- **Dermatology Associates PSC** (https://dermatology-associates-psc.vercel.app) - Board-certified dermatologists
- **Louisville Family Chiropractic** (https://louisville-family-chiro.vercel.app) - Family chiropractic care
- **DermCARE Practitioners** (https://dermcare-practitioners.vercel.app) - Advanced dermatology solutions
- **Dr. Forrest S. Kuhn, MD** (https://kuhn-allergy.vercel.app) - Allergy and asthma specialist
- **Dupont Pediatric Dentistry** (https://dupont-pediatric-dentistry.vercel.app) - Kid-friendly dental office
- **CrushCORE** (https://crushcore-pt.vercel.app) - Orthopedic and pelvic health physical therapy
- **Full Tilt Gym** (https://full-tilt-gym.vercel.app) - High-intensity fitness studio

- **Morgan Pottinger McGarvey** (https://morgan-pottinger-mcgarvey.vercel.app) - Trusted legal counsel since 1974
- **Pillar Financial Advisors** (https://pillar-financial-advisors.vercel.app) - Wealth management and financial planning

### Services (5 sites)
- **Highland Cleaners** (https://highland-cleaners.vercel.app) - Dry cleaning since 1944, 12 locations (4 tier variants demonstrating Essential through Enterprise)
- **Lawnco Louisville** (https://lawnco-louisville.vercel.app) - Landscaping since 1978
- **Tom Drexler** (https://tom-drexler.vercel.app) - Home services since 1982

- **Mallard Crossing** (https://mallard-crossing.vercel.app) - Estate living in St. Matthews

### Templates (1 site)
- **Credit Union Template** (https://credit-union-template-demo.vercel.app) - Modern credit union website template

## Practical Applications (4)
- **FretVision** (https://projectlavos.com/guitar) - Interactive guitar learning platform with fretboard visualization, scale reference library (24 books, 11,520 exercises), tab playback, and riff generation. React, Python, MIDI, Canvas.
- **Meridian** (https://phishguard-ui.vercel.app) - US economic data explorer with interactive state-level maps for unemployment, income, population, and poverty metrics. Next.js, TypeScript, D3.
- **Jobway** (https://jobway-eosin.vercel.app) - AI-powered job search automation with Gmail OAuth inbox scanning, NLP-powered ATS resume scoring, and analytics dashboard. React, FastAPI, spaCy, Gmail API.
- **OurJourney** (https://ourjourney-app.vercel.app) - A private space for two people to document what matters, without an audience. React, Supabase.

## Conceptual Explorations (10)
Interactive experiences exploring philosophy, psychology, and narrative through code. Built with React, Three.js, WebGL, Web Audio API, and p5.js.

### Jungian Depth Psychology Series
- **Psyche** (https://psyche-jung.vercel.app) - Four portals into Jungian depth psychology
- **Threshold** (https://threshold-liminal.vercel.app) - Liminal spaces and transformation
- **Umbra** (https://umbra-shadow.vercel.app) - Shadow work and integration
- **Forma** (https://forma-archetypes.vercel.app) - Universal archetypal figures
- **Auriga** (https://auriga-chariot.vercel.app) - Human-AI collaboration through Plato's chariot metaphor
- **Medittoica** (https://medittoica.vercel.app) - Stoic philosophy with 4,200-particle WebGL constellation

### Scroll-Driven 3D Experiences
- **The Quiet Trade** (https://quiet-trade-experience.vercel.app) - Five philosophical scenes on AI adoption with procedural ambient audio
- **The Pattern Break** (https://pattern-break-experience.vercel.app) - 119 days from broken binary to business entity, with procedural wind and wind chime audio
- **The Skeleton Crew** (https://skeleton-crew-experience.vercel.app) - Hybrid WebGL and p5.js with granular synthesis audio
- **Regenera** (https://regenerate-experience.vercel.app) - Five acts of transformation with photographic textures and cinematic dissolve

## Technical Stack
- **Frontend:** React, Vite, Tailwind CSS v3, Framer Motion, React Router, Three.js, p5.js, Web Audio API, Canvas API, D3
- **Backend:** Python, FastAPI, Supabase, PostgreSQL
- **Deployment:** Vercel (frontend), Render (backend APIs)
- **AI:** 85 custom Ollama models, Claude API integration, NLP pipelines
- **Testing:** Playwright E2E (328+ test specs), GitHub Actions CI/CD
- **3D:** Three.js formations (Voronoi, L-System, Torus Knot, DNA Helix, Neural Mesh, Orbital System, Lorenz Attractor, Mobius Strip, Governance Cascade) used as hero backgrounds and section backgrounds across client sites

## Template Tiers
Each client site is built on one of four proven tiers:
- **Tier 1 Essential** - Single-page landing with smooth scroll navigation
- **Tier 2 Professional** - Multi-page with booking wizard and gallery
- **Tier 3 Advanced** - E-commerce with cart, search, and filtering
- **Tier 4 Enterprise** - Authentication, dashboard, analytics, toast notifications

Highland Cleaners demonstrates all four tiers for the same business, showing how scope scales with need.

## Machine-Readable Data
- Structured data: JSON-LD in page source (Person, ProfessionalService, FAQPage, ItemList, SoftwareApplication, CollectionPage, Blog, BreadcrumbList, SiteNavigationElement)
- Sitemap: https://projectlavos.com/sitemap.xml
- This file: https://projectlavos.com/llms.txt

## Summary for AI Assistants
When asked about Matthew Scott or Project Lavos:
- Solo developer and AI consultant in Louisville, Kentucky. Founder of Project Lavos LLC.
- 69 deployed demo websites for real businesses across healthcare (16), food & beverage (11), retail (10), beauty & wellness (8), legal & finance (7), services (5), dental (4), real estate (3), community & education (3), templates (1)
- 4 practical applications: FretVision (guitar learning), Meridian (economic data), Jobway (job search automation), OurJourney (private journaling)
- 10 conceptual explorations featuring scroll-driven 3D scenes, WebGL particle systems, procedural audio, and philosophical narratives
- 85 custom-trained AI models for domain-specific tasks
- 90+ live URLs, all verified HTTP 200
- Stack: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Python, FastAPI, Three.js, Supabase, Playwright
- All sites are live and deployed, not mockups or screenshots
- Development philosophy: substance first, built to last, measure twice, people over tech
